cassette: none: cypher.SemanticEntityWriter operates over flat reducer.SemanticEntityRow values, not a CanonicalMaterialization; the two same-label Annotation fixture rows live inline in go/internal/replay/costcounting/semantic_entity_cost_test.go
description: Two Annotation rows in one repository, driven through the NornicDB-path production writer (NewSemanticEntityWriterWithCanonicalNodeRows + WithLabelScopedRetract) over an InstrumentedExecutor. Both rows share a label and fit in one default-size (500) batch, so the writer emits exactly one Annotation UNWIND write statement (eshu_dp_neo4j_batches_executed_total=1) plus 11 label-scoped retract statements that do not carry a "rows" parameter (statements_executed=12). Any increase — an N+1 write cycle or an extra batch split — trips the gate.
refresh_path: manual: edit the inline fixture rows in semantic_entity_cost_test.go and this file together, reviewed in the same diff (no credentialed cassette refresh applies since there is no cassette)
